title: endiandra glauca
intro: Endiandra glauca, also known as the Queensland rosewood, is a species of tree native to Australia. The medicinal properties of Endiandra glauca include its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which are derived from its essential oils and compounds. The health benefits of using Endiandra glauca include reducing fever and relieving respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of Endiandra glauca include teas, infusions, and essential oils that can be used topically or inhaled for their medicinal and therapeutic properties.
